zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Clere於1505年12月15日出生在英國素可斯易寧時，她的父親Sir Thomas Clere43歲，母親Lady Emma of Colchester39歲。她於大約1535年與William Pellett在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年8月21日在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Clere于1505年12月15日出生在英国素可斯易寧时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Clere43岁，母亲Lady Emma of Colchester39岁。她于大约1535年与William Pellett在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年8月21日在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Clere was born on 15 December 1505, in Steyning, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Clere, was 43 and her mother, Lady Emma of Colchester, was 39. She married William Pellett about 1535, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 21 August 1558, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Clere est née le 15 décembre 1505, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Clere, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Emma of Colchester, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé William Pellett environ 1535, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Clere am 15. Dezember 1505 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Clere 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Emma of Colchester 39. Sie hat um 1535 in England William Pellett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1558 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Clere è nata il il 15 dicembre 1505 nel Steyning, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Clere, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Emma of Colchester, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato William Pellett circa 1535, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 21 agosto 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.of Steyning, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスステイニング
ja.Steyning, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスステイニング
ja.Colchester, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスコルチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Clereが1505年12月15日にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Clereは43歳，母Lady Emma of Colchesterは39歳であった。約1535年にイギリスでWilliam Pellettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年8月21日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Clere(이)가 1505년 12월 15일 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Clere(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Emma of Colchester(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 영국에서 William Pellett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 8월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.15 December 1505–21 August 1558: 1505 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 15–1558 оны Наймдугаар сарын 21

pt.15 December 1505–21 August 1558: 15 de dezembro de 1505–21 de agosto de 1558
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Clere nasceu em 15 de dezembro de 1505, em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Clere, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Emma of Colchester, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pellett aproximadamente 1535, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Clere родилась 15 декабря 1505 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Clere было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Emma of Colchester, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pellett около 1535 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 21 августа 1558 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.15 December 1505–21 August 1558: 15 de diciembre de 1505–21 de agosto de 1558
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Clere nació el 15 de diciembre de 1505, en Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Clere, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Emma of Colchester, tenía 39 años. Se casó con William Pellett aproximadamente 1535, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
